tasks.title: Delete job artifacts on force delete (result files + job directory)
evidence: internal/api/server.go: DELETE /v1/jobs/{id}?force=true only calls store.Delete without removing result files.
internal/store/store.go: Delete() removes the DB row only; result_path and job directory remain on disk.
plan: Add a store helper to delete job records plus result artifacts and wire it into the force-delete API path.
Cover with tests that create a job + result file then verify cleanup on delete.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Prevent CLI research panic when --urls is blank or only separators
evidence: internal/cli/cli.go: runResearch uses splitCSV(*urls)[0] without checking length; splitCSV removes empty entries.
internal/cli/cli.go: splitCSV() returns [] when input is only commas/whitespace, causing index out of range.
plan: Guard runResearch against empty splitCSV output and return a clear validation error.
Add tests in internal/cli/cli_test.go for inputs like ',', ' , ' to ensure no panic and proper error.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Centralize request validation across CLI, API, MCP, and scheduler
evidence: internal/api/server.go: validates URL scheme/host, timeoutSeconds, maxDepth, maxPages.
internal/cli/cli.go and internal/mcp/server.go do not validate URL/timeouts/depth/pages before creating jobs.
internal/scheduler/scheduler.go enqueues jobs without validating params.
plan: Introduce a shared validation helper (URL, timeout, maxDepth/maxPages, urls list) and reuse it in CLI, API, MCP, and scheduler.
Standardize error messages and add unit tests for validator plus integration tests in affected packages.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Surface scheduler auth resolution errors instead of silently ignoring them
evidence: internal/scheduler/scheduler.go: enqueue() assigns authOptions, _ := loadAuth(...) and discards errors.
internal/scheduler/scheduler.go: loadAuth() can return errors (invalid profile, resolve failure) but they are ignored.
plan: Propagate loadAuth errors and ensure schedules surface failures (log + skip or mark schedule error state).
Add tests for invalid auth profile to verify failure handling.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Add schedule CLI flags for extract config, incremental mode, and auth overrides
evidence: internal/cli/cli.go: runSchedule add only supports auth-profile + pipeline + browser flags; no extract/incremental/auth overrides.
internal/scheduler/scheduler.go: loadExtract reads extractTemplate/extractValidate and enqueue reads incremental but schedule params never set them.
plan: Extend schedule add flags to capture extract-template/config/validate, incremental, and auth overrides (headers/cookies/tokens/login).
Ensure scheduler loadExtract/loadAuth consume these params and add tests for scheduled job param persistence.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Expose schedule management endpoints in the API
evidence: internal/api/server.go: Routes() has no schedule endpoints.
internal/cli/cli.go: runSchedule provides list/add/delete; scheduler exists but API has no access.
plan: Add /v1/schedules list/add/delete handlers that wrap scheduler.LoadAll/Add/Delete with validation.
Update api/openapi.yaml and regenerate clients; add API tests for schedule CRUD.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Add API export endpoint or format parameter for job results
evidence: internal/cli/cli.go: runExport supports jsonl/json/md/csv via exporter.ExportStream.
internal/api/server.go: /v1/jobs/{id}/results only serves raw JSONL, no format conversion.
plan: Add an API endpoint (or format query param) that streams exporter output for json/jsonl/md/csv.
Update openapi + web UI to support downloads; add API tests for format handling.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Expand MCP toolset to include job list/cancel/export
evidence: internal/mcp/server.go: toolsList only includes scrape_page, crawl_site, research, job_status, job_results.
internal/mcp/server.go: no tools to cancel jobs, list jobs, or export results like CLI/API.
plan: Define MCP schemas for job_list, job_cancel, and job_export with necessary arguments.
Implement handlers and add tests in internal/mcp/server_test.go.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Add status filtering to job listing across API, CLI, and TUI
evidence: internal/store/store.go: ListByStatus exists but is only used for recovery.
internal/api/server.go handleJobs and internal/cli/cli.go jobs list have no status filter support.
plan: Add status query param to /v1/jobs and CLI/TUI filters that use ListByStatus when provided.
Add tests for filtered listing and ensure defaults unchanged.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Upgrade TUI to support job details, pagination, and cancel actions
evidence: internal/ui/tui/tui.go: UI only lists jobs and supports q/r; no detail view or actions.
internal/ui/tui/tui.go: fetchJobs always limits to 100 with no pagination or filtering.
plan: Add selection + detail pane for a job, plus keybindings to cancel and open results/export.
Implement pagination or filtering and extend smoke test coverage.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Add auth profile + login flow support to web UI
evidence: web/src/App.tsx: request bodies only include auth basic/headers/cookies/query; no authProfile or login selectors.
internal/cli/cli.go: auth flags include login-url/login-user-selector/login-pass-selector/login-submit-selector + tokens.
plan: Expose auth profile selection and login flow fields in the web UI and include them in request bodies.
Regenerate API types if needed and add/extend UI tests for auth payloads.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Expose pipeline processors and incremental toggle in web UI
evidence: web/src/App.tsx: scrape/crawl/research bodies omit pipeline pre/post processors and transformers.
internal/cli/cli.go: common flags support --pre-processor/--post-processor/--transformer and --incremental.
plan: Add UI controls for pipeline processors/transformers and incremental mode; include in request payloads.
Update/extend App tests to verify payloads.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Make web UI results loading scalable for large JSONL outputs
evidence: web/src/App.tsx: loadResults uses response.text() and splits all lines, loading full results into memory.
internal/api/server.go: /v1/jobs/{id}/results serves full file with no paging/streaming controls.
plan: Add pagination/streaming for results (API support or client-side incremental parsing) to avoid loading full files.
Update UI to lazy-load pages and add tests for large result handling.
Run make test and make ci.

tasks.title: Reject unknown JSON fields in API requests for clearer UX
evidence: internal/api/server.go: JSON decoders accept unknown fields; typos are silently ignored.
No DisallowUnknownFields usage in handleScrape/handleCrawl/handleResearch/auth handlers.
plan: Enable DisallowUnknownFields on API JSON decoders and return actionable error messages.
Add tests to ensure unknown fields trigger 400 responses.
Run make test and make ci.
